rationale: Builds directly on the current best run instead of changing the winning quantizer again. Run 0053 showed the columnwise `mlp.fc.weight` path is the main new gain, and the late phase only gets three quant-aware snaps before wallclock cutoff. This change keeps projection EMA and the exact final serializer intact, but advances the quant-aware mix only for tensors already using the transposed MLP-expansion quantizer, giving those dominant int8 matrices more time in the actual final manifold without disturbing the rest of the model.
title: Advanced Columnwise MLP Quant-Aware Ramp
